_doc: Failing PolicyRenewalWorker job. Info carries the verbatim 'Could not start executor. The workstation is in use by another user.' signature — the entry into the session/console/slot-contention playbook, branch 3 (machine-template slot over-allocation). Credential is valid (no Logon-failed / 0x0000052E), so this is NOT the logon-failure playbook; and two sessions were successfully created on the same host at the same time (see jobs-list-running), so it is NOT session-creation timeout.

Data.Info:
Could not start executor. The workstation is in use by another user. Please retry after the user logs off or disconnects.
   at UiPath.Robot.Service.SessionManager.CreateSessionAsync(LogonRequest request)
   at UiPath.Robot.Service.JobManager.StartJobAsync(JobStartRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
